reasoning: For the Rightmove House Price Index to fall to £260,968 or below before July 2025, there would need to be a catastrophic crash. The most recent Rightmove HPI for February 2025 shows the average asking price at £367,994. A decline of approximately 29% in just four months (March, April, May, June) is practically impossible in the UK housing market, where nominal asking prices are notoriously sticky on the downside (sellers tend to withdraw rather than drastically slash prices). Even during the 2008 financial crisis, prices did not fall this sharply in a four-month window. Therefore, I assign the lowest allowable probability (0.02) to this resolving YES.
